The “demasking” powers would be the first of their kind for an Australian state. Allan […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> AI advice made people three times less accurate but twice as confident, researchers found https://thenextweb.com/news/ai-advice-suppresses-critical-thinking-wrong-answers-study Sun, 19 Jul 2026 15:35:47 +0000 TheNextWeb=2fc07e5d21d4e72bd454c14da328816a Researchers from three French and Italian universities found that access to AI advice collapsed people’s willingness to say “I don’t know” from 44% to 3%. Accuracy dropped from 27% to 9%.
